name: Euroamerica Administradora General De Fondos SA - FI Renta Fija Chile Index Fund
summary: Euroamerica Administradora General De Fondos SA - FI Renta Fija Chile Index Fund is a fixed income fund that tracks a Chilean fixed income index. It is managed by Euroamerica Administradora General de Fondos SA. The fund aims to replicate the performance of the selected Chilean fixed income index, providing investors with exposure to the Chilean bond market.
